benefits.benefit:
Herpes zoster (shingles)- 
Shingrix Vaccine (GSK) is a 
recombinant sub-unit vaccine 
which is to be offered to people 
above the age of 50 and 
immunocompromised patients 
above the age of 18. Dose: 2 
doses, 2 to 6 months apart once 
per lifetime (As per DHA/DHIC 
guidelines).
